title: cyanus velenovskyi
intro: Cyanus velenovskyi, also known as Velenovsky's cornflower, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Central Europe. This plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Cyanus velenovskyi include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Biomedicine & pharmacotherapy = Biomedecine & pharmacotherapie", cyanus velenovskyi benefits are likely related to its flavonoid cynaroside, which has been shown to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anticancer effects.
